text:
Created attachment 193846
Proposed patch (since 466683 revision)

Removed "PORT_ENET_ALL_TARGET_OFF=libenet" from attachment #192299, because client, master and server targets depends on libenet, in this case:
https://github.com/assaultcube/AC/blob/v1.2.0.2/source/src/Makefile#L158-L164
